LAW AND MOTION, 302, ERICK DANIEL BOSCO'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT CLAIMS $300 FOR SCHOOL/CHILDCARE, BUT LISTS NO DEPENDENTS. IN ADDITION, THERE IS A DISPARITY BETWEEN DEFENDANT'S MONTHLY EXPENSES AND HIS TAKE HOME PAY. COURT TO SIGN AND MAIL OUT FORMAL ORDER TO PARTIES. JUDGE: ERNEST H. calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-03-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ROBERT F. COHEN, Tel No. (310) 858-9771 specially appearing for Judgment Creditor Juan Hernandez;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ERICK DANIEL BOSCO'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is denied. Defendant claims $300 for school/childcare, but lists no dependents. In addition, there is a disparity between defendant's monthly expenses and his take home pay. COURT TO SIGN AND MAIL OUT FORMAL ORDER TO PARTIES. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
